Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}You don't look so good. Is the weather getting to you? It's been getting warmer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}There's something I wanted to tell you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Well, we're in the same grade, so I'm sure we'll have plenty of chances to talk...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Even so, I wanted to say this while we're both still on the student council.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Well, this semester is just about wrapping up. All this means is I'm not going to apply next year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}That cigarette business gave me a lot to think about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}This may sound odd, but do you think this country is headed in the right direction?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}I see. Well, I feel differently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}You're an optimistic man, so maybe society looks different through your eyes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}Up until January, there was a sinister cult growing in popularity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 16 0 0}"A society without a future"... For many people out there, that's the reality.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 17 0 0}I was thinking how we could change that... And what it would take to change society.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 18 0 0}My answer to that used to be "reform by those in power." I thought that was the only way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 19 0 0}But starting a revolution just because you have the power to do so creates more problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 20 0 0}That's what the cigarette incident taught me. I realized how naive I had been.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 21 0 0}And it helped me arrive at a different answer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 22 0 0}I think the best thing for society is education.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 23 0 0}Every last individual that makes up our society should have a right to education of heart and mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 24 0 0}I really believe that's what we need the most. And so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 25 0 0}I'm thinking of becoming a teacher.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 26 0 0}A society is shaped by its people. Every person I help grow helps society grow by extension.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 27 0 0}...You're not going to laugh and tell me I'm dreaming?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 28 0 0}Ha... To be honest, I'm amused by the prospect myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 29 0 0}I don't know if I'd make a good teacher. My students would probably hate me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 35 0 0}This was all because of you. So, thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 36 0 0}By the way, no one even talks about the cigarette incident anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 37 0 0}For everyone except me, it was a minor, easily forgotten incident.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 38 0 0}But I don't think I'll ever forget it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 39 0 0}And I won't forget you either, of course.[n]{f 1 1}
